zh.lifeSummary: 當Aaron ap Ednyfed於大約1335年出生在威爾士梅利奧爾塔爾--波特時，他的父親Ednyfed ap Llywelyn51歲，母親Gwenllian ferch Gruffudd37歲。他和Gwenllian ferch Gruffudd至少有5個兒子和1個女兒。他去世在英國威爾斯布雷康史爾塔利波特。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: from a short form of the personal name Adelhard, which is of ancient Germanic origin, composed of the elements adal ‘noble’ + hard ‘bold, hardy’. Compare Ale and Alma 4.

variants.name: Ale
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos Enrique, Cesar, Jose, Maria De Jesus.
Italian (Sicily; Alé): probably a variant of Aleo .

nameMeanings.name: Aaron
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the brother of Moses, who was appointed by God to be Moses' spokesman and became the first High Priest of the Israelites (Exodus 4:14–16, 7:1–2). It is of uncertain origin and meaning: most probably, like Moses , of Egyptian rather than Hebrew origin. The traditional derivation from Hebrew har-on ‘mountain of strength’ is no more than a folk etymology. The name has been in regular use from time immemorial as a Jewish name and was taken up by the Nonconformists as a Christian name in the 16th century. Since the late 1990s it has been widely popular.

variants.name: Arun
meanings: ‘reddish-brown’, the colour of dawn, gold, and rubies, and personification of the dawn, the charioteer of the sun.

variants.name: Arron
meanings: Variant of either   Aaron   or   Arran .

en.lifeSummary: When Aaron ap Ednyfed was born about 1335, in Tal-y-Bont, Merionethshire, Wales, his father, Ednyfed ap Llywelyn, was 51 and his mother, Gwenllian ferch Gruffudd, was 37. He had at least 5 sons and 1 daughter with Gwenllian ferch Gruffudd. He died in Talybont, Breconshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Aaron ap Ednyfed est né environ 1335, à Tal-y-Bont, Merionethshire, Galles, son père, Ednyfed ap Llywelyn, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Gwenllian ferch Gruffudd, avait 37 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille avec Gwenllian ferch Gruffudd. Il est décédé à Talybont, Breconshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Aaron ap Ednyfed um 1335 in Tal-y-Bont, Merionethshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ednyfed ap Llywelyn 51 und seine Mutter Gwenllian ferch Gruffudd 37. Er hatte mit Gwenllian ferch Gruffudd mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb in Talybont, Breconshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Aaron ap Ednyfed è nato il circa 1335 nel Tal-y-Bont, Merionethshire, Galles, il suo padre, Ednyfed ap Llywelyn, aveva 51 anni e il suo madre, Gwenllian ferch Gruffudd, aveva 37 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia con Gwenllian ferch Gruffudd. Morì nel Talybont, Breconshire, Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Aaron ap Ednyfedが約1335年にウェールズメリオンエスシュアイアタル-イ-ボントで生まれた時，父Ednyfed ap Llywelynは51歳，母Gwenllian ferch Gruffuddは37歳であった。彼はGwenllian ferch Gruffuddとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼はイギリスウェールズブレコンシュアイアタリボントで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Aaron ap Ednyfed(이)가 대략 1335년 웨일스 머이오네스실르 탤-이-본트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ednyfed ap Llywelyn(은)는 51세였고, 그의 어머니 Gwenllian ferch Gruffudd(은)는 37세였다. 그는 Gwenllian ferch Gruffudd(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 영국 웨일스 브레콘실르 탤이본트에서 사망했다.

Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha com Gwenllian ferch Gruffudd. Ele faleceu em Talybont, Breconshire, Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Aaron ap Ednyfed родился около 1335 г. в местности тал-и-бонт, мириоунетшир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Ednyfed ap Llywelyn было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Gwenllian ferch Gruffudd, 37. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь от Gwenllian ferch Gruffudd. Он умер в местности талибонт, брекуншир, Уэльс, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Aaron ap Ednyfed nació aproximadamente 1335, en Tal-y-Bont, Merionethshire, Gales, su papá, Ednyfed ap Llywelyn, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Gwenllian ferch Gruffudd, tenía 37 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija con Gwenllian ferch Gruffudd. Murió en Talybont, Breconshire, Gales, Reino Unido.
